text:
On Fri, 2 May 2008 19:43:07 GMT, miwi wrote

> HI Ganael, The port does not build. Can you take a look at it?

> http://amd64.miwibox.org/tb2/index.php?action=describe_port&id=488

Hi Martin,

Strange, it builds @home. Are you sure the patch 'patch-includes-piece.h' is
present in the files/ directory ? I get the same error as your tinderbox when
this file is missing...

Thanks a lot,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
